resources.string: A high-altitude Himalayan resort town, known for its cool climate and snow-capped mountains.
Famous for its beaches, ranging from popular stretches at Baga and Palolem to those in laid-back fishing villages.
The \"Pink City\" is known for its stunning palaces, forts, and vibrant markets.
Stunning volcanic island known for its whitewashed houses and blue-domed churches overlooking the Aegean Sea.
Tropical paradise known for its forested volcanic mountains, iconic rice paddies, beaches, and coral reefs.
The City of Light, home to the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, and world-class cuisine.
The cultural heart of Japan, famous for its numerous classical Buddhist temples, gardens, and imperial palaces.
A global hub of finance, culture, and entertainment, featuring the iconic Statue of Liberty and Central Park.
A tropical nation in the Indian Ocean, known for its beaches, blue lagoons, and extensive reefs.
A port city on South Africa’s southwest coast, on a peninsula beneath the imposing Table Mountain.
Incan citadel set high in the Andes Mountains in Peru, above the Urubamba River valley.
Known for luxury shopping, ultramodern architecture, and a lively nightlife scene.
Italy’s capital, a sprawling, cosmopolitan city with nearly 3,000 years of globally influential art, architecture, and culture.
Adventure capital of the world, set against the dramatic Southern Alps on New Zealand\'s South Island.
The cosmopolitan capital of Spain’s Catalonia region, known for its art and architecture.
Famous archaeological site in Jordan\'s southwestern desert, featuring tombs and temples carved into pink sandstone cliffs.
A 50-kilometer stretch of coastline along the southern edge of Italy’s Sorrentine Peninsula.
Witness the Great Migration and the Big Five in the legendary Maasai Mara National Reserve.
Renowned for its turquoise glacial lakes, majestic mountains, and abundant wildlife in the heart of the Rockies.
A major city in Turkey that straddles Europe and Asia across the Bosphorus Strait.
Thailand\'s largest island, featuring some of the country\'s most popular beaches and luxury resorts.
Capital city of the Czech Republic, bisected by the Vltava River, known for its Old Town Square and Baroque buildings.
Known for its Sydney Opera House, with a distinctive sail-like design, and the massive Darling Harbour.
Cuba’s capital, known for Old Havana’s Spanish colonial architecture and 16th-century landmarks.
The highest mountain in New Zealand, offering spectacular alpine scenery and stargazing.
A former imperial city in western Morocco, home to mosques, palaces, and gardens.
A region encompassing the vast southernmost tip of South America, shared by Argentina and Chile.
A city on Vietnam’s central coast known for its well-preserved Ancient Town, cut through with canals.
The capital and largest city of Iceland, known for its dramatic landscape with volcanoes, geysers, and hot springs.
A city on the banks of the Ganges in Uttar Pradesh, India, regarded as the spiritual capital of India.
